chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-886 of 2023 C.P. No.D-887 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 05.09.2023 M/s Malik Naeem Iqbal and Muhammad Saleem Khaskheli advocates for petitioner(s). Mr. Muzamil Bughio advocate for respondent No.2 / SBCA. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh. ----- After detailed deliberation and arguments it appears that against the notices raising questions of unauthorized construction an appeal has been preferred with Additional Director General-II SBCA Hyderabad, however, since the injunctive orders have not been passed these petitions have been filed. The interim orders were then granted in relation to an order that concerns with the sealing of the premises. It is now agreed that the appeal be heard at the earliest as soon as the officer is posted. Insofar as the sealing of the premises are concerned no action in this regard be taken unless the appeal is heard and decided. However, in case a fresh construction, in violation of the proposed / approved plan is raised the respondent / SBCA is at liberty to issue notices identifying the violation being carried out by the builder / petitioner and only then appropriate action may be taken after hearing. Petitions stand disposed of in these terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
